{{Quote|It is the Yuuzhan Vong who does not accept challenge from a worthy opponent who disgraces his people.|Qau Lah to [[Nom Anor]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth" />}}
'''Qau Lah''' was the leader of the [[Warrior caste|warriors]] on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Yag'Dhul (26 ABY)|attacked]] in the [[Yag'Dhul system/Legends|Yag'Dhul system]] after [[Shok Choka]] was killed by [[Anakin Solo]]. [[Nom Anor]] told him to go and find the 'infidels'. He turned and the [[Intendant caste|Intendant]] shot him in the back of the head. He did this because Qau knew that Nom Anor backed down from a challenge and so was a coward. Nom Anor did not want this information getting to [[Qurang Lah]], the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the Yuuzhan Vong force.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth" />

==Appearances==
